description: Queue of section expansion tasks for the analyst. Each item references a curmudgeon review that found major weaknesses. The analyst writes complete replacement text, one item per run.

items.target: FOUNDATIONAL: New top-level Scoreboard tab + per-row scoreboard schema extensions (data/wins.json, data/predictions.json, new data/killshots.json). Phase 1 = 15 rows.
items.notes: FOUNDATIONAL MODEL CHANGE per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001. Analyst draft produced 2026-04-20. Decider must (a) route to curmudgeon with REQUIRE_ADVERSARIAL_REVIEW, (b) NOT auto-integrate, (c) create tracking issue, (d) log chg-*.json per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-PIPELINE-ROUTING-001. Hold is in effect until operator posts HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-001. The curmudgeon review is for HUMAN-GROUP CONSUMPTION only; it does NOT by itself authorise integration.
items.completion_notes: Phase 1 draft complete: 15 rows, schema spec, scoreboard tab HTML + intro paragraph copy, two formula-script skeletons (V13 Finsler Sydney-Perth + θ=−lonE) with unit tests, integration-point plan, eight anticipated objections. Status locked to draft_awaiting_human_group_review; HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001 kept status=pending per companion routing HNOTE explicit instruction.

items.target: build-scripts/generate-html.js — pie chart generator (generatePieChart) + three :root token blocks. Routes slice fills through CSS verdict tokens, adds per-verdict --label-* ink tokens for WCAG AA in-slice contrast, enlarges legend swatch to 24x24 with 48px row stride for AAA tap-target, deletes redundant matchMedia toggle script.
items.curmudgeon_review: cleared — 2026-04-25T19:43:22Z (qid 261). Recommendation: PROCEED. 0 critical/major, 3 moderate (doc precision: H1 visual contradiction, H2 contrast arithmetic, H3 tap-target overclaim). 4 minor. Integration note: doc fixes can be applied inline at integration time; code changes are sound.
items.notes: Phase B1 (first of three EXPs commissioned by HNOTE-001). EXP-247/248 were subsumed in EXP-244 so this EXP takes the next free slot at 249, not 245 as the HNOTE original assumed. Standalone — no cross-EXP dependency on B2 (DOCX) or B3 (prefix unification). Forward-compatible with HNOTE-002 (verdict-chip click-through): legend stride is sized so wrapping each row in <a> requires no further reflow.
items.completion_note: Six coupled changes in build-scripts/generate-html.js. Three CSS edits append --label-{refuted,stdmodel,selfcon,misleading,notdemo,unfalsifiable} tokens to :root (light), @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark):root, and @media print:root. Two JS edits replace VERDICT_COLORS_LIGHT/DARK hex maps with VERDICT_FILL_TOKENS / VERDICT_LABEL_TOKENS (token-name maps), rewrite generatePieChart to emit fill="var(--token)"/stroke="var(--token)" everywhere, and delete the matchMedia DOM-toggle <script> block (made redundant by CSS @media). Visual: light-mode chart is essentially unchanged for slices already on EXP-210-routed --refuted-solid; the only delta is in-slice labels for Std Model / Self-Contradicted / Misleading switching from white-with-shadow to dark ink. Dark-mode chart now passes WCAG AA contrast (was failing for Misleading and Unfalsifiable). Includes computed contrast table for all 12 (verdict × theme) combos. Smoke test: 6/6 label tokens present when all slices ≥ 8%; 6/6 fill tokens present in callouts; no hex literals, no data-dark, no <script> tag, no text-shadow. JSON validates and patched generate-html.js parses with node --check. Out of scope (per HNOTE-001 boundary): verdict bar chart, table verdict cells, kill-shot badges, pie-chart redesign (doughnut/ordering), DOCX pipeline (B2), prefix unification (B3), verdict-chip click-through (HNOTE-002).
items.integration_note: Targets build-scripts/generate-html.js — infrastructure file; operator must apply. Moderate doc fixes (H1/H2/H3) can be noted inline.
items.operator_action_note: Curmudgeon cleared (qid 261 popped, 2026-04-25). 3 moderate doc-precision issues (ISS-1554/1555/1556) noted inline — EXP acceptance criteria text corrections. Code changes are sound per curmudgeon. Operator must apply to build-scripts/generate-html.js.

items.target: WIN-064 detail_extra — dome quote citation verification
items.notes: WIN-064 detail_extra cites two dome quotes from wins.html that are in V51-era text but not in our V50.6 raw-text archive. Dome defender can challenge provenance. Fix: (1) find Wayback Machine snapshot of wins.html from before EXP-200 commit date (2026-04-21) confirming the quotes existed, or (2) capture a new raw-text snapshot of current wins.html and add to archive. The quotes: (a) Sub-Terrestrial Wall of the Closed Toroidal Ovoid creates a physical P-wave shadow zone between 104° and 140°; (b) physical structural boundary where the aetheric return path meets the bottom plate of the ovoid cavity.

items.target: WIN-036 OTS cross-page consistency — Timestamp Error tab vs OTS WIN prose
items.notes: Two conflicting accounts of what status_history.json contains. Timestamp Error tab (generate-html.js ~line 1832) says prediction parameters live ONLY in monitor.py/model.html. OTS WIN prose (WINs 031/035/036/037/038/039) says status_history.json bundles prediction-side fields alongside observation fields. Option A: update tab prose to acknowledge mixed structure while maintaining separate-document critique (requires build-scripts/generate-html.js edit, PROP-016 stranded path). Option B: revert OTS WIN prose to simpler language consistent with tab (wins.json self-apply). Evaluate which is more defensible and propose the fix. If choosing Option A, produce exact replacement prose for the ~3 sentences starting at "OpenTimestamps anchors status_history.json" in generate-html.js.
